title: yCredit the Ape
relevance_summary: Withdrawals from a newly deployed contract without proper vetting or public announcement

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to a newly deployed contract without prior public announcement or audit

red_flags: Newly deployed contract without public announcement or audit
Funds sent to a contract shortly after deployment
summary: A newly deployed contract, yCredit, was exploited due to lack of public announcement or audit. Funds were sent to the contract without proper vetting, leading to potential loss.
